title: Die Bräutigamswitwe
writer: Bobby E. Lüthge, Walter C. Mycroft, Károly Nóti
actors: Mártha Eggerth, Georg Alexander, Fritz Kampers
plot: The night before his wedding George gets drunk and marries a chorus girl. Her boyfriend appears, they fight and are believed dead, so she is now "the bridegroom's widow" (die Bräutigamswitwe). When they both come back one after an...
